items.name: Monday Crispy Pub Wings
items.description: 10 crispy split wings – buttermilk brined hand breaded. Choice of house-made dipping sauce.
items.simplified_description: Ten crispy hand-breaded chicken wings with dipping sauce.

items.name: Tuesday 2 FOR 1 Chicken Tenders
items.description: 2 Orders of 1/3 pound crispy fried chicken tenders. Choice of 2 housemade dipping sauces.
items.simplified_description: Two orders of crispy fried chicken tenders with dipping sauces.

items.name: MOTHER CLUCKER SNACK PACK
items.description: Crispy fried chicken tender snack pack with a choice of small fries or coleslaw.
items.simplified_description: Crispy chicken tenders served with small fries or coleslaw.

items.name: MOTHA CLUCKER
items.description: MOTHA CLUCKIN’ HOT 1/3 POUND CRISPY FRIED BREAST, TOSSED IN HONEY HOT SAUCE & BLUE CHEESE MAYO, COLESLAW, PICKLES ON A HANDMADE BUN
items.simplified_description: Spicy crispy chicken breast sandwich with blue cheese mayo and coleslaw.

items.name: POLLO LOCO
items.description: NEW!! SPICY MEXICAN CRISPY CHICKEN SANDWICH, TAJIN MAYO, LIME SLAW
items.simplified_description: Spicy Mexican crispy chicken sandwich with tajin mayo and lime slaw.

items.name: CRISPY FAMILY PACK
items.description: PERFECT FOR 4. 8 PCS CRIPSY FRIED CHICKEN, 4 HANDMADE BISCUITS, LARGE GRAVY, CHOICE OF A LARGE COLESLAW OR FRIES.
items.simplified_description: Family pack with 8 fried chicken pieces, biscuits, gravy, and sides.

items.name: BONELESS BITES
items.description: 1/3 POUND CRISPY FRIED DARK MEAT CHICKEN BITES TOSSED IN HOT SAUCE OR CRISPY WITH SIDE DIPPING SAUCE.
items.simplified_description: Crispy fried dark meat chicken bites with hot sauce or dipping sauce.
